name: s7g-committee
description: S7G Committee P2P Agent — manages peer discovery over Iroh relay, blob transfer, and committee health monitoring

skills.name: Discover Peers
skills.description: Find other committee members via Iroh relay topic, return their node IDs and advertised services

skills.name: Transfer Blob
skills.description: Send or receive binary data between committee nodes over Iroh QUIC streams

skills.name: Health Check
skills.description: Report committee node status: uptime, connected peers, memory, active tasks
